data.body: Calibration analysis session (2026-07-14): quantified plan-review iteration excess. Key numbers: block rate tripled to 52-67%/day at calibration-2 (96f5f374a, 07-08); 76% of extra rounds follow BLOCKs; 87% of blocking findings are new each round (serialized discovery); rising floor never dropped a finding (287/382 post-flip reviews ineligible, 240 lacking a certified prior signature - BLOCK loops never sign; 33 eligible, 0 drops); T5c 288 advisories/7d 0 blocks; T5d 2 findings (irrelevant); fan-out up to 10 blocking findings per defect (a879). Operator approved the non-Q2 remediation set; Q2 items (plan-v2 threshold replay + ac_unverifiable floor sub-grade) held pending approval. Epic d195-aeb8-2400-484b (deadsmooth-provincial-shrew) with children 67da(docs) d156(T5c) 8086(coach-blocks) 5e64(dedup) a850(floor-eligibility, sequenced after epic/audit-enrichment lands) 0730(novelty eval). Ordering chosen to avoid epic/audit-enrichment's attest.py rewrite.
